James Byrne
Electrical Supervisor
Location: Bradford

Profile
Electrical supervisor with experience on cleanrooms, mission critical, and high-spec fit-out packages. Interested in stepping into a broader electrical site management role.

Experience
2022 - Present | Electrical Supervisor | Westbridge Projects
Lead electrical supervisors and subcontractor teams on a cleanroom refurbishment. Coordinated QA/QC close-out, testing interface, daily reporting, and labour sequencing.

2019 - 2022 | Electrical Supervisor | Mission Critical Build Ltd
Worked on fast-track data centre phases, supporting package coordination, snagging, and programme recovery across night-shift and weekend possession windows.

2016 - 2019 | Approved Electrician | Core Install Services
Delivered installation works and supported supervisors on commercial fit-out projects.

Qualifications
SSSTS
ECS
IPAF

Availability
Immediate. West Yorkshire travel is fine and Leeds is workable.
